name: Perfect Party Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 6 rib, loin or shoulder pork chops, 3/4-1 inch thick
1 can cream of mushroom soup, condensed/undiluted
6 slices green pepper, 1/4-1/2 inch thick rings
2 packages Frozen Rice Medley or Frozen Long-Grain White & Wild Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a large skillet, brown the pork chops in hot oil; drain excess fat.
3. Prepare rice according to package directions and spread it evenly between the chops, including into the pepper rings.
4. In a small bowl, combine soup and mushrooms.
5. Place the pork chops in a 13x9 inch baking dish. Pour the soup mixture over the chops.
6. Arrange one slice of onion on each chop.
7. Top each chop with a slice of green pepper.
8. Bake at 325°F for 1-1 1/4 hours.
9. Before serving, top each chop with cherry tomatoes.
10. If desired, garnish with parsley.
Makes 6 servings.
Per serving: 270 calories, 12 g protein, 24 g carbohydrate, 14 g fat, 950 mg sodium, 125 mg potassium
Pillsbury Easy & Elegant Recipes, Pillsbury Classics #10, p. 56
